mapper.select: SELECT TYPE, MAX_VALUE, CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR, WARNING FROM b_threshold_t ORDER BY FIELD(TYPE, 'CPU', 'MEM', 'TRAFFIC', 'TEMPERATURE', 'HUMIDITY')

SELECT t.DEVICE_ID, t.TYPE, t.CRITICAL, t.MAJOR, t.MINOR, t.WARNING, d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_IP FROM r_threshold_t t LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON t.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL ORDER BY t.DEVICE_ID, FIELD(t.TYPE, 'CPU', 'MEM', 'TRAFFIC')

SELECT t.DEVICE_ID, t.TYPE, t.CRITICAL, t.MAJOR, t.MINOR, t.WARNING, d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_IP FROM r_threshold_t t LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON t.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL WHERE t.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} ORDER BY FIELD(t.TYPE, 'CPU', 'MEM', 'TRAFFIC')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO r_threshold_t (DEVICE_ID, TYPE, CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR, WARNING) VALUES (#{DEVICE_ID}, #{TYPE}, #{CRITICAL}, #{MAJOR}, #{MINOR}, #{WARNING}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CRITICAL = #{CRITICAL}, MAJOR = #{MAJOR}, MINOR = #{MINOR}, WARNING = #{WARNING}
